languages.original_text: "Many secrets lie within that blessed temple fortress. I spent decades there, but still I am not certain that I discovered all of them! However, the station's clergy are not known for their insularity for nothing — they are quite reluctant to make contact with the laity, or even other Tech-Priests. Nuncius and I were lucky that our skills were in demand, and we were able to ensconce ourselves in that fountain of wisdom."

languages.text: "Эта благословенная крепость-храм хранит в себе множество тайн. Я провел в ней десятилетия, но до сих пор не уверен, что познал их все! Однако духовенство станции не зря славится своей закрытостью — они весьма нехотя идут на контакт с мирянами и даже с иными техножрецами. Нам с Нунциусом повезло, что наши навыки оказались востребованны и мы смогли прильнуть к этому фонтану мудрости".

"Many secrets lie within that blessed temple fortress. I spent decades there, but still I am not certain that I discovered all of them! However, the station's clergy are not known for their insularity for nothing — they are quite reluctant to make contact with the laity, or even other Tech-Priests. Nuncius and I were lucky that our skills were in demand, and we were able to ensconce ourselves in that fountain of wisdom."

However, the station's clergy are not known for their insularity for nothing — they are quite reluctant to make contact with the laity, or even other Tech-Priests. Nuncius and I were lucky that our skills were in demand, and we were able to ensconce ourselves in that fountain of wisdom."

"Many secrets lie within that blessed temple fortress. I spent decades there, but still I am not certain that I discovered all of them! However, the station's clergy are not known for their insularity for nothing — they are quite reluctant to make contact with the laity, or even other Tech-Priests. Nuncius and I were lucky that our skills were in demand, and we were able to ensconce ourselves in that fountain of wisdom."

"Many secrets lie within that blessed temple fortress. I spent decades there, but still I am not certain that I discovered all of them! However, the station's clergy are not known for their insularity for nothing — they are quite reluctant to make contact with the laity, or even other Tech-Priests. Nuncius and I were lucky that our skills were in demand, and we were able to ensconce ourselves in that fountain of wisdom."

languages.text: «Ese bendito templo fortaleza oculta muchos secretos. Me pasé décadas allí, pero ¡aún no sé con certeza si los descubrí todos! Sin embargo, la fama aislacionista del clero de la estación está bien justificada: son muy reacios a contactar con los laicos, e incluso con otros tecnosacerdotes. Nuncius y yo tuvimos la suerte de que necesitaran nuestras habilidades, y gracias a aquello pudimos adentrarnos en esa fuente del saber».
languages.original_text: "Many secrets lie within that blessed temple fortress. I spent decades there, but still I am not certain that I discovered all of them! However, the station's clergy are not known for their insularity for nothing — they are quite reluctant to make contact with the laity, or even other Tech-Priests. Nuncius and I were lucky that our skills were in demand, and we were able to ensconce ourselves in that fountain of wisdom."

traits.locale_text: «Ese bendito templo fortaleza oculta muchos secretos. Me pasé décadas allí, pero ¡aún no sé con certeza si los descubrí todos! Sin embargo, la fama aislacionista del clero de la estación está bien justificada: son muy reacios a contactar con los laicos, e incluso con otros tecnosacerdotes. Nuncius y yo tuvimos la suerte de que necesitaran nuestras habilidades, y gracias a aquello pudimos adentrarnos en esa fuente del saber».

languages.text: “那座受祝的神殿要塞里藏着无数秘密。我在那里待了几十年，也不敢说把所有秘密都发掘出来了。不过，那座星站的神职人员们出了名的封闭。他们极不愿意与教外人士接触，甚至不愿与其他技术神甫来往。幸好他们需要我和努恩修斯的技术，我们这才得以在那座智慧之泉安顿下来。”
languages.original_text: "Many secrets lie within that blessed temple fortress. I spent decades there, but still I am not certain that I discovered all of them! However, the station's clergy are not known for their insularity for nothing — they are quite reluctant to make contact with the laity, or even other Tech-Priests. Nuncius and I were lucky that our skills were in demand, and we were able to ensconce ourselves in that fountain of wisdom."

traits.locale_text: “那座受祝的神殿要塞里藏着无数秘密。我在那里待了几十年，也不敢说把所有秘密都发掘出来了。不过，那座星站的神职人员们出了名的封闭。他们极不愿意与教外人士接触，甚至不愿与其他技术神甫来往。幸好他们需要我和努恩修斯的技术，我们这才得以在那座智慧之泉安顿下来。”

languages.text: « Ce temple-forteresse sacré renferme bien des secrets. J'y ai passé des décennies entières, et pourtant, certains m'échappent encore, j'en suis sûr ! Cela étant, ce n'est pas pour rien si le clergé de la station est réputé pour son sectarisme : ses membres rechignent généralement à discuter avec les profanes, voire avec les autres technoprêtres. Par chance, ils avaient besoin de mes talents et de ceux de Nuncius, ce qui nous a ouvert les portes de cette fontaine de savoir. »
languages.original_text: "Many secrets lie within that blessed temple fortress. I spent decades there, but still I am not certain that I discovered all of them! However, the station's clergy are not known for their insularity for nothing — they are quite reluctant to make contact with the laity, or even other Tech-Priests. Nuncius and I were lucky that our skills were in demand, and we were able to ensconce ourselves in that fountain of wisdom."

traits.locale_text: « Ce temple-forteresse sacré renferme bien des secrets. J'y ai passé des décennies entières, et pourtant, certains m'échappent encore, j'en suis sûr ! Cela étant, ce n'est pas pour rien si le clergé de la station est réputé pour son sectarisme : ses membres rechignent généralement à discuter avec les profanes, voire avec les autres technoprêtres. Par chance, ils avaient besoin de mes talents et de ceux de Nuncius, ce qui nous a ouvert les portes de cette fontaine de savoir. »

languages.text: "Viele Geheimnisse sind in dieser gesegneten Tempelfestung verborgen. Ich habe Jahrzehnte dort verbracht, bezweifle aber, dass ich sie alle entdeckt habe! Allerdings ist der Klerus der Station nicht ohne Grund für seine Abgeschlossenheit bekannt ... sie pflegen nur widerwillig Kontakt mit Laien oder anderen Techpriestern. Nuncius und ich hatten das Glück, dass unsere Fähigkeiten gefragt waren und wir uns in diesem Brunnen der Weisheit niederlassen konnten."
languages.original_text: "Many secrets lie within that blessed temple fortress. I spent decades there, but still I am not certain that I discovered all of them! However, the station's clergy are not known for their insularity for nothing — they are quite reluctant to make contact with the laity, or even other Tech-Priests. Nuncius and I were lucky that our skills were in demand, and we were able to ensconce ourselves in that fountain of wisdom."

Allerdings ist der Klerus der Station nicht ohne Grund für seine Abgeschlossenheit bekannt ... sie pflegen nur widerwillig Kontakt mit Laien oder anderen Techpriestern. Nuncius und ich hatten das Glück, dass unsere Fähigkeiten gefragt waren und wir uns in diesem Brunnen der Weisheit niederlassen konnten."

languages.text: 「祝福された寺院の要塞には、多くの秘密が隠されている。私はそこで何十年も過ごしたが、いまだにそのすべてを発見できたとは思っていない！しかし、このステーションの聖職者たちは、その島国根性で無駄に知られているわけではない。ヌンシウスと私は幸運にも、私たちのスキルが求められ、知恵の泉に身を置くことができた」。
languages.original_text: "Many secrets lie within that blessed temple fortress. I spent decades there, but still I am not certain that I discovered all of them! However, the station's clergy are not known for their insularity for nothing — they are quite reluctant to make contact with the laity, or even other Tech-Priests. Nuncius and I were lucky that our skills were in demand, and we were able to ensconce ourselves in that fountain of wisdom."

languages.text: "O kutsal tapınak kalesinde pek çok sır yatıyor. Orada onlarca yıl geçirdim ama hâlâ hepsini keşfettiğimi sanmıyorum! Gelgelelim istasyonun rahipleri, boşuna içe dönüklükleriyle bilinmez. Ruhban dışı sınıfla, hatta diğer Tekno Rahiplerle iletişim kurma konusunda pek isteksizdirler. Nuncius ve ben şanslıydık ki becerilerimize talep vardı. O bilgelik pınarında kendimize yer edinebildik."
languages.original_text: "Many secrets lie within that blessed temple fortress. I spent decades there, but still I am not certain that I discovered all of them!
